channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Industry News
channel.description: Latest Industry News news in Context Engineering

item.title: MolPaQ: Modular Quantum-Classical Patch Learning for Interpretable Molecular Generation
item.description: arXiv:2604.08575v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Molecular generative models must jointly ensure validity, diversity, and property control, yet existing approaches typically trade off among these objectives. We present MOLPAQ, a modular quantum-classical generator that assembles molecules from quant...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> fine-tuning, embedding, arxiv, API, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: excel-mcp-server - A Model Context Protocol server for Excel file manipulation

item.title: mcp-agent - Build effective agents using Model Context Protocol and simple workflow patterns
